    injectLoggerField(TypeElement, String) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.processor.JavacLogInjector
    Injects private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(clazz) into the given class element's AST.

    J

    Java 9+ module requirements - Section in class io.signoz.springboot.processor.JavacAstLogInjector
     
    JavacAstLogInjector - Class in io.signoz.springboot.processor
    Concrete Javac AST-level log field injector.

    JavacLogInjector - Class in io.signoz.springboot.processor
    Encapsulates the Javac internal API usage for injecting a logger field.

    P

    process(Set, RoundEnvironment) - Method in class io.signoz.springboot.processor.SigNozLogProcessor
     

    S

    SigNozLogProcessor - Class in io.signoz.springboot.processor
    Annotation processor that injects a private static final SLF4J Logger field into every class annotated with SigNozLog.
    SigNozLogProcessor() - Constructor for class io.signoz.springboot.processor.SigNozLogProcessor
     

    T

    tryCreate(ProcessingEnvironment, Messager) - Static method in class io.signoz.springboot.processor.JavacLogInjector
    Attempts to create a working injector backed by Javac internals.
